overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from a cyberpunk-style game, driving through a rainy neon-lit city at night before entering a dark tunnel and accelerating to high speeds. The footage features a futuristic car dashboard with speedometer readings and atmospheric green lighting throughout.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, with heavy rain streaking the windshield and neon-lit skyscrapers visible on both sides. The vehicle is gradually slowing down from 50 km/h while green atmospheric lighting permeates the scene.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop at an urban intersection in the rain, with a red traffic light visible ahead. The dark entrance to a tunnel becomes visible in the distance as the vehicle waits.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a completely enclosed dark tunnel, leaving the rain behind, and rapidly accelerates to 200 km/h. Sparse ceiling lights streak past as the vehicle speeds through the narrow concrete corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a rain-drenched neon city into the sterile acceleration of a dark tunnel. It begins by gliding through a cyberpunk street under heavy rain, with neon-lit skyscrapers flanking the road and green atmospheric lighting filling the cabin as the car gradually slows. As the vehicle comes to a complete stop at an urban intersection, the rain continues to streak the windshield while a red traffic light holds the car before a dark tunnel entrance. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle enters the enclosed concrete corridor, leaving the rain behind and rapidly accelerating to high speeds. Finally, the environment transforms into a blur of motion, with sparse ceiling lights streaking past the windshield as the speedometer climbs toward 200 km/h.
